wikitext: {{also|护}} {{character info}} ==Translingual== ===Alternative forms=== * In Taiwan and Hong Kong, the component above {{l|mul|蒦}} is written with ⻀ (ram's horn component), which is the orthodox form found in the {{w|Shuowen Jiezi}} ({{lw|zh|說文解字}}) and {{w|Kangxi dictionary}}. * In mainland China (based on {{w|Xin Zixing}}, {{lw|zh|新字形}}), Japanese {{w|kanji}}, Korean {{w|hanja}} and Vietnamese {{w|History of writing in Vietnam|Nôm}}, the component above {{l|mul|蒦}} is written with {{l|mul|艹}} (grass radical). ===Han character=== {{Han char|rn=149|rad=言|as=14|asmj+=13|sn=21|snmj+=20|four=04647|canj=YRTOE|ids=⿰訁蒦}} ====Derived characters==== * {{l|mul|[[𧅰]]}} ====Related characters==== * {{l|mul|[[护]]}} ''({{w|Simplified Chinese}})'' ====References==== {{Han ref|kx=1184.170|dkj=36038|dj=1647.240|hdz=64023.040|uh=8B77}} ==Chinese== {{zh-forms|s=护}} ===Glyph origin=== {{Han etym}} {{Han compound|言|蒦|c1=s|c2=p|ls=psc}}. ===Etymology=== Likely cognate with {{cog|bo|འགོགས་པ||to prevent; to avert; to repel}} ({{zh-ref|Schuessler, 2007}}). ===Pronunciation=== {{zh-pron |m=hù |m-s= |m-x=hū |dg=хў3 |c=wu6 |c-dg=fu3 |c-t=vu5 |g=fu5 |h=pfs=fu;hrs=h:fu˖;gd=fu4 |j=hu3 |mb=hŭ |md=hô |mn=ml,jj,tw:hō͘ |mn-t=hu6 |mn-l=hu6 |px=pt,xy:hou5/pt,xy:ou5 |px_note=hou5 - literary; ou5 - vernacular |sp=wu6 |w=sh,jd,cm,cz,jx,hz,sx,nb,zs:6wu;sj:6vu;sz:6ghou |w-j=6u |x=fu5/fu4 |x_note=fu5 - vernacular; fu4 - literary |mc=y |oc=y |cat=v }} ===Definitions=== {{head|zh|hanzi}} # to [[protect]]; to [[safeguard]]; to [[defend]]; to [[shelter#Verb|shelter]] #: {{zh-x|保護 環境|to '''[[protect]]''' the [[environment]]}} # to [[side]] with {{gl|someone}}; to [[take]] [[side]]s; to [[discriminate]] [[in favor of]]; to show [[prejudice]] {{gl|to a particular party}} ====Synonyms==== * {{sense|to protect}} {{syn-saurus|zh|維護}} * {{sense|to side with}} {{zh-l|偏袒}} ===Compounds=== {{col3|zh|護髮素|家庭護理|保護食物|保護國|不護細行|導護|守護神|保護主義|守護|偏護|保護狀制|愛護|回護|保護關稅|保護貿易|強制辯護|保護管束|庇護權|庇護|保護人|加護|將護|呵護|官官相護|加護病房|大都護|外交庇護|保護作物|保護鳥|保護區|修護|保護色|保護級|保護|擁護|救護站|核子防護|更生保護|掩護射擊|救護|戒護|普通護照|招護|監護人|政治庇護|打掩護|搭護|看護|掩護|直接保護|監護|環境保護|特別護士|空中護航|照護|救護車|攝護腺|掩護部隊|辯護人|耳護子|護過飾非|護持|觀護|護花使者|護疼|護理|養護|護身符|護臂|防護林|調護|防護團|護身物|袒護|護理師|護貝|護坡|護養|護腿|衛護|護士節|都護|護城河|護民官|護喪|護前|護航|護胸|護月|觀護人|護套|護衛|護坡工程|護佐|貿易保護|護法戰爭|遮護|防護|護士長|醫護|維護|護槽|護頭|護膝|護犢子|護軍將軍|護手|護書|辯護|護送|護照|自然保護|護衛艦|護官符|護炕|護耳|護短|護欄|護兵|護心鏡|護法|護封|迴護|醫護人員|護軌|護盤|護日|護禿兒|關稅保護|護駕|護身|護符|護票卡|護庇|護士|護壁|護國軍|護國佑民|護向|觀護制度|護從|被保護國|護身龍|護于}} {{cat|cmn|Intermediate Mandarin}} ==Japanese== ===Kanji=== {{ja-kanji|grade=5|rs=言14}} #
